# zstack_monitor_group (Resource)

Manage monitor group in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the monitor group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the monitor group.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the monitor group.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the monitor group.
